title: erucastrum nasturtiifolium subsp. nasturtiifolium
intro: Erucastrum nasturtiifolium subsp. nasturtiifolium, also known as Hoary Cress or Naked Cress, is a perennial plant in the mustard family native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high content of glucosinolates. The plant offers various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as supporting digestion and immune function. Herbal preparations of Hoary Cress include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from respiratory issues to skin problems.
